estimators.name: David Regehr-Wiens
estimators.title: Estimating / Site Supervision / Project Administration — Jilmark Construction Ltd.
personalization_hooks: One of four-person team that handles estimating + site supervision + project admin — wears multiple hats so VALUES tools that reduce admin load (Ashrah's automated daily reports = direct fit)
Jilmark works heritage buildings, apartments, condos, offices, warehouses, dealerships, churches, schools — wide paint scope variety

fallback_contact.name: John Froese
fallback_contact.title: Owner / Founder, Jilmark Construction Ltd.
fallback_contact.rationale: John is the founder — 35+ years construction experience, founded Jilmark in 2001 after 26 years in commercial construction. He's still hands-on (attends regular site meetings). Strong multi-decade Winnipeg roots. Specialty in apartments and condominiums = high-volume paint scope. Personal involvement angle: ask him how he got started; he'll respect a founder-to-founder approach from Ahmad.
